subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi JE!
Here's a picture from Christmas eve. I spent it with Saudi girl, Thana and
her friends. The neighbor was slaughtering screaming goats for eid... Should
I call Animal Rights...anyone...?
Out of work - again. It's exhausting. I must find something very soon. Many
leads but nothing solid and I don't trust anything here anymore. What a
year...

Always love :)
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
